content.text:
Updated `docs/development-plan-v1.md` with a four-pass review on the `12.4` `E1–E6` row and applied all identified must-fix/should-fix/nit items.

### Findings and Fixes (one skill at a time)

- **`developer-senior`**
  - **Must-fix:** `E1–E6` excluded `T22` even though `T22` is part of `E6` in `§6.2`.
  - **Must-fix:** reviewer scope said “QA on T14” but QA is assigned beyond T14 in `§6.2`.
  - **Should-fix:** done gate was too broad (`manual matrix + CI`) without concrete completion criteria.
  - **Nit:** make merge-readiness expectations explicit before the table.
  - **Status:** implemented.

- **`developer-security`**
  - **Must-fix:** done gate did not explicitly require security-critical outcomes (authz/audit/no-PHI-log checks) for the `E2/E4/E6` span.
  - **Should-fix:** clarify security review application based on reviewer map + risk profile.
  - **Nit:** tighten gate wording to reduce interpretation drift.
  - **Status:** implemented.

- **`developer-quality-assurance`**
  - **Must-fix:** gate did not explicitly require all relevant Stage `0.5` manual rows plus `T22` checklist completion.
  - **Should-fix:** align QA mention to `§6.2` reviewer mapping, not a single ticket shorthand.
  - **Nit:** explicitly name baseline CI commands for release-readiness clarity.
  - **Status:** implemented.

- **`developer-code-quality`**
  - **Should-fix:** “code-quality always” existed, but checklist completion wasn’t explicitly a merge expectation.
  - **Nit:** keep wording consistent with session defaults and quality bar language.
  - **Status:** implemented.

### What changed

```596:604:docs/development-plan-v1.md
### 12.4 Epic review and acceptance matrix

**Merge-ready expectation (non-trivial work):** green CI with `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run test` (including coverage floors in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)); `developer-code-quality` checklist complete before review; apply `developer-senior`, `developer-security`, and `developer-quality-assurance` wherever the reviewer column and risk profile require.

| Epic      | Includes tickets | Primary reviewers                                   | Epic done gate                                                                               |
| --------- | ---------------- | --------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **E1–E6** | T1–T14, T22      | Sr/Sec/QA per §6.2 reviewer column; code-quality always | Stage **0.5** rows in §12.5 are signed off **and** T22 release checklist complete; CI green with coverage floors; authz/audit/no-PHI-log checks pass |
```

```685:691:docs/development-plan-v1.md
| 1.0     | Initial staged development plan (**0.5** prod slice → **1.0**); aligns to PRD v1.2 + TDD v1.2.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 1.1     | Align linked-input versions (**PRD/TDD v1.3**); fix epic numbering (**E7–E11**); clarify **FR-017** / **FR-018**; trace **NFR-001**, **NFR-004**, **NFR-007**; add **§12.6** mobile standard; tighten quality gates (**§12.5–§12.6**, a11y).                      |
| 1.2     | **§5.1** NFR-010 alerting starters; **E12** + **T23**/**T24** + Definition of ready; **§12.1** session-default vs lean **Skills** (developer-manager alignment); prompts **T23–T24**; **§12.4–12.5** **E12** / Later scenarios.                                   |
| 1.3     | **§12.2** heading **T1–T24**; Session defaults ↔ **§12.5** (template alignment); template cross-refs (**§12.2** prompts, **§12.5** code-quality tie) synced with `**development-plan-template`** + `**development-planner`**.                                     |
| 1.5     | **§12.5** expanded **0.5** manual matrix (incremental API/web/ops rows + execution note); **§8** manual-scenario bullet aligned; **§12.5** intro clarifies sign-off vs stage gate and **Related tickets** = **all** merged before a row is runnable/sign-offable. |
| 1.6     | **§12.5** manual procedure checklist + steps for matrix row 3 (upload sign URLs, **T5**/**T6**).                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 1.7     | **§12.4** **E1–E6** gate tightened: include **T22**, align reviewer scope to **§6.2**, and require explicit CI/coverage + security + release-checklist completion criteria.                                                                                    |
```

Also updated document control version to `1.7`.

### Verification

- Ran lints/diagnostics check for `docs/development-plan-v1.md`: no issues reported.

### Follow-up

- Optional next pass: apply the same explicit gate style to other `12.4` epic rows (`E7+`) for consistency and to reduce reviewer interpretation drift across future stages.

Then I’ll add regression tests and move to the web upload flow fix.
